data.content: Still blocked on knots-c8f4 (state: ready_for_plan_review). The canonical ArtifactTarget vocabulary (branch, pull_request, merged_main, live_deployment) has not been implemented or merged. Current codebase still uses legacy OutputMode enum (Local, Remote, Pr, RemoteMain) and prompt templates only define values [remote_main, pr]. Cannot add conditional sections for canonical targets until c8f4 lands.
